data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that 'shape checks so source payload matches source type exactly' is satisfied. However, there is no evidence provided that explicitly demonstrates the implementation or validation of these shape checks. The existing evidence primarily focuses on the creation and management of offers and bookings, without addressing the specific requirement of payload shape validation.
gaps: No evidence of shape checks validating source payload against source type.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
